summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements for the Dream Jobs Consultancy website. All 9 major requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-9) appear to be substantially implemented. The contact section (REQ-7) customer support image reference is confirmed in the file summary. Overall the implementation is thorough with some extra features added beyond what was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: FounderSection component featuring a person named 'Basheer Ahmed' with photo, quote, and 3 years of experience highlight
hallucinated_features.reason: No founder section or any mention of a founder named Basheer Ahmed was requested in the build request

hallucinated_features.description: ServicesSection displaying six services (Overseas Job Placement, CV Enhancement, Interview Preparation, Employer Coordination, Documentation Guidance, Candidate Support)
hallucinated_features.reason: A dedicated ServicesSection was not requested in the build request; the requirements only asked for specific named sections

hallucinated_features.description: DisclaimerSection covering job placements, service fees, visa processing, legal compliance, and candidate responsibilities
hallucinated_features.reason: A disclaimer section was not mentioned or requested anywhere in the build request

hallucinated_features.description: AboutSection stats cards showing '5000+ Placements' metric
hallucinated_features.reason: No specific placement count metrics were requested; the build request only specified the company description text without such statistics

hallucinated_features.description: WhyTrustUsSection success metrics block showing '500+ Successful Placements', '50+ Partner Companies', '98% Candidate Satisfaction', '3+ Years of Excellence'
hallucinated_features.reason: These specific numerical metrics were not requested in the build request for the WhyTrustUsSection

hallucinated_features.description: VisionMissionSection Core Values cards (Integrity, Candidate-First, Excellence, Care)
hallucinated_features.reason: Core values cards were not part of the REQ-5 specification, which only asked for Vision and Mission text

hallucinated_features.description: Google Search Console verification meta tag and OpenGraph/Twitter Card social metadata in index.html
hallucinated_features.reason: SEO meta tags and social card metadata were not requested in the build request
